event: Two people walking past a statue near a building
description: A brightly colored modern painting showing a man and woman walking hand in hand along a sunlit path beside a large building. A green-blue statue of a seated figure stands to the left beneath lush trees painted in bold blocks of green. The building has warm stone-colored walls with blue shutters. The sky is pale blue with white clouds. The style is post-impressionistic with bold, blocky brushwork and vivid colors in pink, purple, green, and blue.

_meta.title: 43. Trees in the Garden of Saint Paul Hospital with Statue of Vincent 2017 by Anthony D. Padgett (after Van Gogh Saint Remy 1889)
